evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: `fzf-make` is a command line tool that executes commands using fuzzy finder with preview window. Currently supporting [**make**](https://www.gnu.org/software/make/), [**npm**](https://docs.npmjs.com/about-npm), [**pnpm**](https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm), [**yarn**](https://github.com/yarnpkg/berry), [**just**](https://github.com/casey/just), [**task**](https://github.com/go-task/task).

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: # 🛠️ Features - Select and execute a make target or (npm | pnpm | yarn) scripts or just recipe or task using fuzzy-finder with a preview window by running `fzf-make`! - Execute the last executed command(By running `fzf-make --repeat`.) - Command history - Support [**make**](https://www.gnu.org/software/make/), [**npm**](https://docs.npmjs.com/about-npm), [**pnpm**](https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm), [**yarn**](https://github.com/yarnpkg/berry), [**just**](https://github.com/casey/just), [**task**](https://github.com/go-task/task). - Support passing additional arguments to the command using popup window. The UI looks like: https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/447 - [make] Support `include` directive - [npm] Support workspace (collect scripts from all `package.json` files in the workspace using `npm query`). - **Note that the minimum supported npm version for workspace support is `8.16.0` (required for `npm query`).** - [pnpm] Support workspace(collect scripts all of `package.json` in the directory where fzf-make is launched.) - [yarn] Support workspace(collect all scripts which is defined in `workspaces` field in root `package.json`.) - [just] Support execution inside of directory o…

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: # 📦 Installation ## macOS ### Homebrew ```sh # install brew install fzf-make ```

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: `fzf-make` can be installed from the [AUR](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/fzf-make) using an [AUR helper](https://wiki.archlinux.org/title/AUR_helpers). For example:

evidence.title: v0.68.0
evidence.excerpt: ## Key Highlights * perf(make): improve performance issue of preview window by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/594 This PR fixes the behavior that fzf-make hangs when the line has syntax like `$(eval RESOLVED_TARGETS := $(shell bash resolve.sh $(DEPENDENCY_SERVICES)))`. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/compare/v0.67.0...v0.68.0

evidence.title: v0.67.0
evidence.excerpt: ## Key Highlights A new task runner is supported! Now, fzf-make supports **npm**!🎉 This feature was added by @Lemorz56 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/581. Thanks you @Lemorz56! ## What's Changed * docs: init issue templates by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/580 * feat(runner): add support for npm by @Lemorz56 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/581 ## New Contributors * @Lemorz56 made their first contribution in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/581 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/compare/v0.66.0...v0.67.0

evidence.title: v0.66.0
evidence.excerpt: ## Key Highlights copy selected command to clipboard feature has been added in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/574 You can copy commands to press `ctrl + y`! ## What's Changed * docs(readme): add ratatui badge by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/560 * chore(deps): update `edition` in `rustfmt.toml` by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/561 * refactor(error): move`panic_info` to error module by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/563 * docs(readme): update cargo install command for rustc v1.90.0 by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/562 * fix(ui): key binding for opening additional arguments window is missing by @kyu08 in https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/pull/573 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kyu08/fzf-make/compare/v0.65.0...v0.66.0
